hero.desc: Building scalable, secure backend systems and cloud-native solutions. 8+ years delivering results for businesses that demand reliability.
hero.stat1.label: Years exp.
hero.stat2.label: Projects
hero.stack.label: Core tech stack
about.label: About me
about.h2: Code that holds up. Architecture that scales.
about.p1: I'm a dedicated consultant specialising in enterprise .NET development and Microsoft cloud solutions. Over 8+ years I've delivered projects ranging from APIs to full cloud migrations, always with a clear focus on long-term maintainability.
about.p2: My approach is pragmatic: I combine my technical knowledge with a understanding of what makes software valuable for a business. Clean architecture, proper testing, solid CI/CD.
about.p3: Based in the Netherlands, working with clients across industries including Logistics, Automotive, Audio & Video conference, SaaS and PaaS.
about.value1.title: Backend & Architecture
about.value1.desc: Designing systems that grow gracefully. Clean architecture, and API-first thinking.
about.value2.title: Cloud-Native on Azure
about.value2.desc: From App Services and Functions to Static Web Apps with end-to-end Azure expertise cost-consciousness built in.
about.value3.title: Security by Default
about.value3.desc: Security embedded from day one. Compliance, threat modelling, and hardened deployments.
about.value4.title: Automation & CI/CD
about.value4.desc: Reliable, repeatable deployments. Infrastructure as code, automated testing.
skills.label: Technical skills
skills.intro: Deep specialist knowledge, built over years of real-world delivery.
exp.label: Background
exp.tagline: A track record of delivering complex technical projects, on time and without surprises.
exp.item1.title: .NET Consultant: Independent
exp.item1.desc: Designing and implementing enterprise-grade backend solutions for clients across multiple industries. Specialised in cloud-native Azure architectures, API platform development, and introducing CI/CD practices in teams transitioning from legacy workflows.
exp.item2.title: Cloud Software Engineer
exp.item2.desc: Designing and implementing enterprise-grade backend solutions for clients across multiple industries. Specialised in cloud-native Azure architectures, API platform development, and introducing CI/CD practices in teams transitioning from legacy workflows.
exp.item3.title: Cloud Backend Engineer
exp.item3.desc: Working at a scale-up in software development for circular economy solutions.
exp.item4.title: Team Lead Software Engineering
exp.item4.desc: Team lead connected vehicles within a team of 7 developers, Cloud and Embedded.
exp.item5.title: Subject Matter Expert Smart charging
exp.item5.desc: Additonal role of working on integration between smart charging systems and backend platforms.
exp.item6.title: Embedded Software Engineer
exp.item6.desc: Design and implement of IoT telemetry applications for connected vehicles, based on CAN-bus data and conversion to telemetry data.
exp.item7.title: Technical Specialist Hybrid & Electric
exp.item7.desc: Diagnostics mechanic for hybrid and electric vehicles.
exp.item8.title: Technical Specialist Automotive
exp.item8.desc: Started out as a car mechanic and progressed to a technical specialist role in the automotive industry.
contact.label: Get in touch
contact.p: Open to new consulting engagements? Whether you're starting from scratch or aiming for growth, I'd love to hear about your project.
contact.check3: Typically responds within one business day

terms.toc.label: Contents
terms.disclaimer: Disclaimer: The Dutch version of this document is the only legally binding version. The English document is for translation purposes only. Wherever the English version differs from the Dutch version, the Dutch version applies.
terms.intro: We advise that you carefully read these Terms and Conditions so that you are aware of your rights and duties under the Agreement between you and us. You shall be identified as the Commissioning Party.
terms.binding-note: Legally binding version: Dutch. This English version is provided for convenience and translation purposes only.
terms.art1.title: Definitions
terms.art1.def-intro: In these Terms and Conditions the following terms, identified by capital letters, shall have the following meaning:
terms.art1.def1.desc: The sole proprietor JVR TechSolutions, with registered office at 5131BX Alphen, Baronielaan 24.
terms.art1.def2.desc: These terms and conditions of JVR TechSolutions.
terms.art1.def3.desc: The service provided by JVR TechSolutions.
terms.art1.def4.desc: All intellectual property rights, such as copyrights, trademark rights, law of patents, trade name rights, database rights and related rights, including related rights such as rights to know-how and domain names.
terms.art1.def5.desc: You, the commissioning party and counterparty of JVR TechSolutions of the Agreement.
terms.art1.def6.desc: The agreement for services between JVR TechSolutions and Commissioning Party specifying the Services.
terms.art2.title: Applicability
terms.art2.cl1: The Terms and Conditions apply to every Agreement between JVR TechSolutions and Commissioning Party. Possible general conditions of the Commissioning Party are hereby explicitly rejected.
terms.art2.cl2: Derogations from and additions to the Agreement are exclusively valid when Parties agree in writing to them.
terms.art2.cl3: These Terms and Conditions also apply to the provision of the Services by the other party, when the Commissioning Party involves other Parties in order to provide the Services.
terms.art2.cl4: JVR TechSolutions is entitled to amend these Terms and Conditions. Substantive changes enter into force one (1) month after publication. Changes in the Terms and Conditions do not affect an existing Agreement.
terms.art3.title: Establishment of the Agreement
terms.art3.cl1: Offers of JVR TechSolutions are non-committal, unless a period of validity is included in the offer. If no acceptance period is included, the offer will always expire after the period stated in the offer.
terms.art3.cl2: If the Commissioning Party assigns without a preceding offer to JVR TechSolutions, JVR TechSolutions is only bound to this assignment after it has confirmed this in writing to the Commissioning Party.
terms.art3.cl3: An offer for the provision of multiple services does not force JVR TechSolutions to the provision of a part of the Services in this offer at a corresponding amount of the price.
terms.art3.cl4: Offers, quotations and rates do not automatically apply to re-orders and/or new assignments.
terms.art4.title: The Service
terms.art4.cl1: JVR TechSolutions always provides its services according to an obligation of means and will not guarantee the result of its service unless Parties explicitly agree otherwise in writing.
terms.art4.cl2: JVR TechSolutions will implement the Agreement to the best of one's knowledge and ability and in accordance with the laid down requirements for a professional party. If and as far as a proper implementation requires this, JVR TechSolutions has the right to let third parties execute certain activities, at the discretion of JVR TechSolutions. The applicability of articles 7:404, 7:407 and 7:409 BW will explicitly be excluded.
terms.art4.cl3: An agreed term is considered as a final deadline only when that is explicitly determined in writing in the Agreement. In all other cases the agreed term shall be regarded as indicative.
terms.art4.cl4: JVR TechSolutions is entitled to the execution of the activities in parts or phases, whereby every part or every phase separately can be invoiced.
terms.art5.title: Commissioning Party's Obligations
terms.art5.cl1: The Commissioning Party undertakes to provide all necessary information and cooperation which JVR TechSolutions requires in order to provide the Services. JVR TechSolutions may suspend the activities as long as Commissioning Party does not comply with the obligation in this provision. JVR TechSolutions shall never be liable for any damage and/or delay caused by not, not timely, or flawed complying to the duty of disclosure and obligation to cooperate as referred to in this article.
terms.art6.title: Termination of the Agreement
terms.art6.cl1: The duration of the Agreement is determined in the Agreement itself.
terms.art6.cl2: JVR TechSolutions is allowed to terminate the Agreement in writing at all times with due regard to a period of notice of 1 month. JVR TechSolutions shall not be required to provide any form of compensation or financial remuneration caused by an (intermediate) termination.
terms.art6.cl3: The Client may terminate the Agreement prematurely, whereby a notice period of at least 1 month applies.
terms.art6.cl4: Either Party will have the right to terminate the entire Agreement or partially with immediate effect if the other Party goes bankrupt or is granted a moratorium, including the case of termination or liquidation of the company of the other Party.
terms.art6.cl5: If the Agreement is terminated at any time and at that moment Services have already been implemented, the already implemented Services and the related payment obligation of the Commissioning Party will not be subjected to any obligation to undo, unless the Commissioning Party can prove that JVR TechSolutions is in default with regard to specifically those Services. The amounts that have been invoiced prior to the termination by JVR TechSolutions regarding proper implementation or delivered performance in the framework of the Agreement remain due in full and are repayable on demand at the moment of termination.
terms.art6.cl6: The Commissioning Party is liable to third parties for the consequences of the cancellation and will protect JVR TechSolutions against resultant claims of these third parties.
terms.art7.title: Remuneration and Payment
terms.art7.cl1: All amounts as mentioned in an offer or Agreement are expressed in Euros and are provided including VAT and possible other charges imposed by the government, unless mentioned differently.
terms.art7.cl2: Commissioning Party shall settle the invoice within the period of fourteen (14) days after the invoice date. If payments are not made in due time, this instalment shall be considered as the final deadline, and the Commissioning Party will be in default without further notice of default.
terms.art7.cl3: If the Commissioning Party believes that the amount of the invoice is incorrect, or that there is any other inadequacy in the invoice, they shall immediately inform JVR TechSolutions accompanied by convincing evidence. Contestation of (a part of) an invoice does not suspend the payment obligation of the Commissioning Party with regard to the undisputed part of that invoice.
terms.art7.cl4: JVR TechSolutions is entitled to change its rates at any time. JVR TechSolutions shall inform the Commissioning Party at least two (2) months prior to an adjustment of rates. If JVR TechSolutions has announced an adjustment of rates, the Commissioning Party may terminate the Agreement until the moment that the adjustment of rates enters into force, observing a notice period of one month.
terms.art7.cl5: JVR TechSolutions is entitled to annually increase its rates in accordance with the Consumer Price Index, as published by Statistics Netherlands, without this providing the right to denounce or otherwise terminate the Agreement for the Commissioning Party.
terms.art8.title: Intellectual Property Rights
terms.art8.cl1: All Intellectual Property Rights that rest on documents or materials that the Commissioning Party delivers to JVR TechSolutions in the framework of the execution of the Agreement remain at all times with the Commissioning Party. Commissioning Party provides a worldwide, non-exclusive and sublicensable licence to JVR TechSolutions to use the delivered materials for the execution of the Agreement.
terms.art8.cl2: The Intellectual Property Rights which lie with JVR TechSolutions when entering into the Agreement remain with JVR TechSolutions.
terms.art9.title: Liability
terms.art9.cl1: JVR TechSolutions is not liable for indirect damage or resulting damage, such as lost profits, lost sales, loss of expected savings and other similar financial losses, as well as loss of goodwill or name and reputation.
terms.art9.cl2: To the extent that JVR TechSolutions is liable, that liability is limited to a maximum of the compensation which the Commissioning Party has paid under the Agreement.
terms.art10.title: Miscellaneous
terms.art10.cl1: Commissioning Party is not entitled to transfer arising rights and/or obligations from the Agreement to third parties without permission of JVR TechSolutions, unless Parties have agreed otherwise in writing.
terms.art10.cl2: If any provision of this Agreement is or becomes invalid or non-binding, Parties remain bound to the other provisions. Parties shall replace the invalid provisions in proper consultation with another provision which is valid and approximates the intention of Parties as far as possible.
terms.art10.cl3: Dutch law applies to the Agreement. All disputes shall in the first instance be presented to the competent court in the district where JVR TechSolutions is located.
